summary: Make task claims and JSON/JSONL state crash-safe and concurrency-safe
description: Make task claims and JSON/JSONL state crash-safe and concurrency-safe
acceptance: Concurrent claims cannot both acquire the same task
JSON state writes use atomic replacement and JSONL appends are process-locked
Stale locks are detected and recoverable without stealing a live lock

evidence.summary: 65 pytest tests and make check passed; concurrent claim race has exactly one winner and one claim event; 90 concurrent JSONL appends remain complete and parseable; live flock cannot be stolen; killed owner is recovered with stale evidence; JSON writes and queue transitions use fsync plus atomic replace/move.
